zh.title: 格庵遗录 - 韩国南师古预言书六十篇详解与验证 | Gyeogam Yurok
zh.description: 《格庵遗录》相传为朝鲜王朝预言家南师古（号格庵）所著的预言书，以汉文写成，共六十篇，涉及壬辰倭乱、日本殖民、南北分裂、朝鲜战争等朝鲜半岛重大历史事件。本站整理部分篇章原文并进行验证分析。
zh.keywords: 格庵遗录,南师古,格庵,韩国预言,朝鲜预言,Gyeogam Yurok,Nam Sago
zh.ogTitle: 格庵遗录 - 韩国南师古预言详解 | Gyeogam Yurok
zh.ogDescription: 朝鲜王朝预言家南师古《格庵遗录》六十篇预言收录与验证分析。涵盖壬辰倭乱、殖民统治、南北分裂等朝鲜半岛历史。
zh.twitterDescription: 格庵遗录预言验证：壬辰倭乱、日本殖民、光复独立、南北分裂、朝鲜战争等。南师古预言逐篇解析。

en.title: Gyeogam Yurok - Korean Prophecy of Nam Sa-go | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Gyeogam Yurok (格庵遗录) is a Korean prophecy text attributed to Joseon-era scholar Nam Sa-go (styled Gyeogam), written in classical Chinese. It contains 60 chapters predicting major events on the Korean Peninsula including the Imjin War, Japanese colonial rule, and national division.
en.ogTitle: Gyeogam Yurok - The Korean Prophecy of Nam Sa-go
en.ogDescription: 60-chapter Korean prophecy text by Joseon scholar Nam Sa-go. Full archive with verification covering the Imjin War, colonial rule, Korean division, and beyond.
en.twitterDescription: Gyeogam Yurok prophecies verified: Imjin War, Japanese colonization, Korean liberation, North-South division, Korean War and more.

structuredData.name: 格庵遗录预言
structuredData.description: 朝鲜王朝南师古《格庵遗录》预言收录与验证

acceptedAnswer.text: 《格庵遗录》相传为朝鲜王朝学者南师古（1509—1571，号格庵）所著的预言书。南师古精通易学、风水、天文、占卜，据说少年时在金刚山遇神人授秘诀，遂记录成书。全书以汉文写成，共六十篇，据信预言了朝鲜半岛从壬辰倭乱到未来的重大历史事件。但学术界对其真伪存在较大争议。

mainEntity.name: 格庵遗录的预言准确吗？

acceptedAnswer.text: 书中被认为预言了壬辰倭乱、日本殖民统治、光复独立、南北分裂、朝鲜战争等多个历史事件。但学术界主流观点认为现存版本可能系后人伪作——1977年李道殷公开的版本被证明是事后编写的，书中出现了现代汉语词汇如「哲学」「共产」「原子」等，这些词语在南师古生活的16世纪并不存在。

Gyeogam Yurok (격암유록, 格庵遗录) is a Korean prophecy text attributed to Nam Sa-go (1509–1571), a Joseon-era scholar who styled himself 'Gyeogam.' He was renowned for his mastery of the I Ching, geomancy, astronomy, and divination. The text contains 60 chapters written in classical Chinese (Hanja), believed to predict major events on the Korean Peninsula. However, its authenticity is disputed — scholarly consensus suggests the surviving text may be a modern forgery.
